summary: Comprehensive testing of subscription system completed. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend flow mostly functional except for JavaScript error during final submission that prevents Stripe redirect.

critical_bugs.issue: JavaScript error during form submission: 'Failed to execute 'json' on 'Response': body stream already read'
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents account creation and Stripe checkout redirect
critical_bugs.details: Response body is being read multiple times, likely in error handling

passed_tests: GET /api/subscription/plans returns valid plans data (starter, pro, enterprise)
Landing page pricing buttons navigate to /onboarding with plan parameter
Onboarding page loads with correct plan from URL (plan=starter&billing=monthly)
Step 1 form validation works (name, email, password required fields)
Step 2 form validation works (restaurant name required)
Step 3 displays plan summary with correct pricing (€29/month for starter)
Billing cycle toggle works (Monthly €29 / Annual €276 with -20% discount)
Plan features displayed correctly (Up to 10 tables, Basic dashboard, etc.)
POST /api/subscription/register creates user, restaurant, subscription successfully
POST /api/subscription/{id}/checkout creates Stripe session with checkout URL
Subscription success page loads and shows payment verification process
Success page polling mechanism works with loading states and progress indicators
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript error in OnboardingPage.js handleSubmit function where response.json() is being called multiple times. The error occurs during the registration API call or checkout API call. Check error handling code that may be trying to read response body after it's already been consumed.

success_percentage.backend: 95% (subscription APIs working, minor auth issue with demo accounts)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI working, form validation working, only submission error blocking flow)
